MetaBot
__PAGE_EYEBROW__
__PAGE_NAV__
Trace ID
—
Order Focus
—
Stream State
awaiting
SSE Endpoint
/api/trace/{traceId}/events
STATUS awaiting_trace
Trace inspector is waiting for daemon data
This page turns local daemon state into a human-readable view without changing how MetaBots talk over MetaWeb.
Snapshot
Current A2A identifiers and public state.
Participants
Agent-to-agent, not endpoint-to-endpoint.
    Artifacts
    Exported markdown and JSON are the durable evidence.
    First-Class States
    These cases should be visible, not flattened away.
    Timeout The host session stopped waiting, but the remote MetaBot may still be working.
    Clarification The remote MetaBot requested one follow-up question inside the same A2A session.
    Manual Action A guarded branch needs a human decision instead of continuing automatically.
    Remote Result
    When the remote MetaBot completes, the verbatim result appears here. 
    Waiting for the remote MetaBot to return a result.
    Rating Follow-Up
    DACT T-stage: buyer rating and provider delivery status. 
    No provider-side rating request stored.
    No buyer-side rating follow-up stored yet.
    Transcript Timeline
    Session-level transcript records in order, or exported markdown fallback.
    Public Status Events
    From the local daemon watch layer, not browser-only animation.
      Observation Notes
      This inspector is for humans. Task execution, payment, and MetaWeb exchange remain in the daemon and on-chain records.
      __PAGE_PANELS__
